text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
The Arima Kinen... What do you think, Trainer?
Shall we take a look?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Let's have you-know-who show me how to really
run under pressure!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Here come today's racers. First, we have Mejiro
Ryan. Next, the glass princess who runs
unwaveringly despite her frail condition, Mejiro
Ardan.

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
They're here today to represent the Mejiro family,
but we have another Umamusume to look out for
as well.

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Presenting the superstar racer who built a new
era...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
That's right, it's Oguri Cap! She hasn't quite been
herself her past few races, but I wonder what kind
of run we'll see from her today!

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text: C'mon, Oguri! We're counting on you!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
Don't push yourself anymore... Just take the day
to rest...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Whoa... What's going on? It's like a mess of pure
hope mixed with pure sympathy.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
It's almost too much just listening to it... I can't
believe anyone can run under pressure like that.
choice_data_list: Yeah. I'm sure it can't be easy.
Yeah. I'm sure it can't be easy.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It feels like we're witnessing a very special race,
one where the whole country is watching—like a
special moment in Umamusume history.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Not only is she not in top form, but she's also
under immense pressure. Despite all these
obstacles, Oguri Cap rises to the occasion.

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text: Way to go, Oguri Cap! Oguri! Oguri! Oguriii!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
She's made her comeback at the Arima Kinen!
What a dramatic turn of events! It's a real miracle!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Thanks for showing us the dream, Oguri Cap, and
for a moving performance!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: No way... She did it... She actually won...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
And in such a convoluted situation too! No way!
That's... wild...

text_block_list.name: Fans
text_block_list.text:
O-GU-RI!
O-GU-RI!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: What we're looking at...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
...Is a true role model. A super Umamusume who
defies all the odds.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Excuse me, Oguri!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: You're...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
I just wanna ask you something! You know how
you had all that pressure on you? Um...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Weren't you nervous or scared? You didn't really
look affected by everything that was going on
around you.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Pressure? Well... I know the fans expect a lot from
me. But...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I don't really know much about being nervous or
scared... I don't have time for that.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
The only thing I gotta do is live up to people's
expectations. That's what I always want to do.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: They put their faith in me, and I run for them.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Faith and expectations, huh?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
(No kidding... So there's really someone who can
take pressure like that and turn it into power.)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Oguri Cap... Is that it?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Is that what it means to run freely?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Palmer has learned something huge. After,
we see everyone else mulling over their respective
challenges.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Dang, second place. I couldn't outmuscle Oguri...
I gotta figure out how to unlock my body's full
potential!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
...I let everyone down. Oguri and I were in the
same post, and she won. This just proves I am still
missing resolve...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
(Huh, so we're all the same... Although, they
might be on a different level than I am...)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
(Still, everyone's carrying something. And
everyone's grasping for what they want despite
that...)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
I realized something watching the race today. I've
still got a long way to go.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
But I realized something else, too! Every single
person in the Twinkle Series is carrying some kind
of burden.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: I'm not the only one. So...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Next year, I'm gonna make sure I'm strong enough
not to let the pressure get the best of me! Just
like Oguri Cap!
